notes: Independent fresh-context review verified: exclude_stalled opt-in genuinely preserves every pre-existing test (grep-confirmed, zero old call sites touched), stall tracker never writes maturity_map.yaml (confirmed via generate_maturity_map_data.py read path), new tests exercise real behavior not trivial truths (e.g. draws the same atom twice, asserts stall flips, asserts a DIFFERENT atom drawn third time).
